mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_weekly_report_approval_log (report_id, approver_id, approver_role, action, comment, created_at) VALUES (#{reportId}, #{approverId}, #{approverRole}, #{action}, #{comment}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT l.id, l.report_id AS reportId, l.approver_id AS approverId, u.name AS approverName, u.avatar_url AS approverAvatar, l.approver_role AS approverRole, l.action, l.comment, l.created_at AS createdAt FROM sys_weekly_report_approval_log l LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = l.approver_id WHERE l.report_id = #{reportId} ORDER BY l.created_at ASC
